_description: Structured inventory of every production file in the breakability codebase. Used to track modularization progress.

scripts/build-check.sh.purpose: Main deterministic analysis orchestrator - discovers PRs, runs baseline builds, per-PR ecosystem builds, CVE extraction, verdict determination

scripts/post-fallback-comments.sh.purpose: Legacy comment renderer + merge plan generator - reads build-results.json, posts PR comments, creates merge plan issue

scripts/merge-results.sh.purpose: Merges per-batch build-results JSON files, runs cross-PR detection, security posture scan

scripts/run-local.sh.purpose: Local development runner - exercises build-check.sh end-to-end with subset of PRs

scripts/lib/baseline_builds.sh.purpose: Branch fetch, baseline builds, vuln scan

scripts/lib/post_loop.sh.purpose: Post-loop cross-PR deps, security scan, cleanup

scripts/lib/pr_metadata.sh.purpose: PR metadata extraction — extracted from build-check.sh (Phase 9)

scripts/lib/pr_build.sh.purpose: Per-PR build orchestration — extracted from build-check.sh (Phase 9)

scripts/lib/pr_test.sh.purpose: Per-PR test execution — extracted from build-check.sh (Phase 9)

sync-to-deployments.sh.purpose: Syncs scripts/ to NDM/VCP deployment repos

scripts/core/evidence_contract.py.purpose: Typed evidence dataclasses (EvidenceBundle, EvidenceRecord, SignalName, etc.) and pure decide() function

scripts/core/verdict_contract.py.purpose: Single source of truth for authoritative_verdict() - bucket mapping and gate prediction

scripts/core/build_results_schema.py.purpose: Typed schema contract for build-results.json — dataclasses, normalization, validation. Prevents key-name drift (12 known aliases)

scripts/core/ai_reassert.py.purpose: AI reassertion logic — extracted from post-fallback-comments.sh (Phase 8)

scripts/core/policy_overlay.py.purpose: Policy-lowering overlay — maps policy_lowering.decision to verdict_v2, extracted from post-fallback-comments.sh (Phase 8)

scripts/core/pr_utils.py.purpose: PR data utilities — field extraction, verdict mapping, extracted from post-fallback-comments.sh (Phase 10)

scripts/core/pr_data_assembler.py.purpose: PR data assembly — builds per-PR field objects from build-results.json, extracted from post-fallback-comments.sh (Phase 10)

scripts/ai/ai_backend.py.purpose: Unified AI model backend with record/replay cassette system

scripts/ai/generate_ai_merge_plan.py.purpose: AI-enriched or template merge plan generation

scripts/ai/generate_ai_verdicts.py.purpose: AI verdict generation for REVIEW PRs

scripts/policy_lowering.py.purpose: Central evidence integration - imports 5 local modules, builds typed evidence bundles

scripts/cross_pr_deps.py.purpose: Cross-PR dependency detection — extracted from build-check.sh CROSSDEPS heredoc

scripts/security_posture_scan.py.purpose: Dependabot alert attribution — extracted from build-check.sh SECURITYEOF heredoc

scripts/rendering/normalizers.py.purpose: Signal normalization (verdict, changelog, test, probe, reachability)

scripts/rendering/comment_builder.py.purpose: Structured PR comment body builder — extracted from post-fallback-comments.sh (Phase 7)

scripts/rendering/merge_plan.py.purpose: Deterministic merge-plan issue body generator — extracted from post-fallback-comments.sh (Phase 7)

scripts/rendering/truncate_plan.py.purpose: Merge plan truncation for GitHub comment size limits — extracted from post-fallback-comments.sh (Phase 7)

scripts/rendering/pr_fields.py.purpose: PR field extraction and formatting — extracted from post-fallback-comments.sh (Phase 8)

scripts/rendering/residual_risk.py.purpose: Residual risk rendering for PR comments — extracted from post-fallback-comments.sh (Phase 8)

scripts/probe/sandbox.py.purpose: Agent env scrubbing, ephemeral home, run_agent

scripts/probe/npm_probe.py.purpose: npm runtime-shape probe with embedded JS

scripts/write_skip_entry.py.purpose: Skip entry writer — extracted from build-check.sh

scripts/discover_peer_groups.py.purpose: Peer dependency discovery — extracted from build-check.sh

tests.note: 33 schema contract tests added; 1 pre-existing merge_plan_renderer GLANCE assertion failure

.github/workflows/breakability-reusable..purpose: Main reusable workflow - 3 jobs: discover, deterministic, finalize

.github/workflows/ci.yml.purpose: CI for the breakability repo itself

workflows/breakability-agent.yml.purpose: Standalone workflow synced to deployment repos

action.yml.purpose: Composite GitHub Action entry point (Copilot agent path)
